project_name: Interior Fit-Out Works for Electrolux Office @ Dubai-UAE

line_items.description: Contractor preliminaries, mobilization, site setup, PPE
Authority approval charges & security deposit (by client)
Coordination charges for landlord/authority approvals
Technical drawings (Architectural & MEP) for submission
CAR insurance for fit-out works during execution
Regular & deep cleaning, debris removal to dump
Site protection (common areas, lift, corridor)
Scaffolding charges

Remove existing gypsum partition & dispose

Remove existing tile flooring (entrance/WC/pantry only)
Remove existing wall tiles & dispose
Remove existing wooden/glass doors & dispose
Remove existing joinery (cladding/cabinets/vanity) & dispose
Remove existing MEP items (lights/AC/sanitary) & dispose
